steps.title: Divide both sides by 5 to isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Start with $5|x| = 45$. Divide both sides by 5:
$$|x| = 9$$

steps.title: Solve and identify the positive solution
steps.content: The equation $|x| = 9$ has two solutions: $x = 9$ and $x = -9$ (since both are 9 units away from zero). The positive solution is \$9$.
